base_language: put the bowl on the stove
instructions: Open the top drawer of the cabinet
Close the top drawer of the cabinet
Open the bottom drawer of the cabinet
Close the bottom drawer of the cabinet
Pick up the wine bottle
Put the wine bottle on top of the cabinet
Place the black bowl on the rack
Put the plate on top of the cabinet
Put the butter on the plate
Put the butter inside the bottom drawer of the cabinet
Put the black bowl inside the top drawer of the cabinet
Put the rack next to the stove
Put the plate next to the black bowl
Put the wine bottle on the rack
Turn on the stove
Put the plate in front of the stove
Move the black bowl to the top of the cabinet
Pick up the butter
Put the wine bottle next to the butter
Put the rack on top of the cabinet
